name: Nitesh Kumar
headline: MERN Stack Developer
about: Hi, I'm Nitesh Kumar, a third-year B.E. Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering student at PDEA's College of Engineering, Pune under Savitribai Phule Pune University.
I am passionate about Full Stack Web Development, Data Structures & Algorithms, and building scalable web applications that solve real-world problems.
I enjoy solving challenging programming problems, learning modern technologies, and continuously improving my software engineering skills.
Currently, I am looking for Software Development or Full Stack Development Internship opportunities where I can contribute while learning from experienced engineers.
